The Amazing Race


Race Menu

Menu

Save Manager

Save Slots

Store, load, rename, or delete race saves from this browser. Slots are local to this device.
Race Setup

Race Setup

Season Control

Build the race in layers.

Start with the essentials, then open the deeper panels only when you want to tune the machine. Defaults are ready to race.

At a Glance

Current season

Setup path
1. Essentials 2. Cast 3. Route 4. Skills 5. Transport 6. Presets
Only the Essentials panel is required. Everything else is optional seasoning.
01 Required Essentials Cast size, money, leg length, finale, chaos, seed. Open
How many teams start the season.
Cash each team starts with.
Cash added after Leg 1.
Chance last place survives a non-final leg.
Chance a Yield Board appears on each non-final leg. Each team may use one Yield per race.
How long a yielded team must wait. Default is 60 minutes.
Minimum and maximum tasks before the pit stop.
Finale task range.
Base minutes before skills modify the time.
How many teams remain when the finale begins.
0 makes teams depart together. 1 keeps gaps unchanged.
Controls how much finishing order affects the next departure.
12h3 days7 days10 days
Time between the winner checking in and the next leg starting.
Controls delay odds and size.
Same setup + seed can replay the same race chaos.
02 Cast Team names & colors Edit the roster shown in results, charts, and race screens. Open
Roster Editor
Team colors appear in the clue-by-clue chart and active race rows.
03 Route Season route Auto weighted route or a custom city order. Open
Route Builder
Auto keeps the hidden city-weight system. Custom lets you pick a U.S. start, ordered non-U.S. cities, and a U.S. finale.
Custom routes feed normal legs in order; the finale triggers when the final-team count is reached.
United States only.
United States only.
Use Move Up, Move Down, or Remove to set the order. If the list runs out, auto-fill takes over.
04 Skills Team abilities Randomize, set your team, or hand-edit the full cast. Open
Choose how skills are assigned.
Applies to whichever team you select later.
Skill names can be edited below.
Skill Names
Blank names become Skill 1, Skill 2, etc.
Custom Team Skills
Edit every team manually. Use Set All for quick profiles.
05 Travel Transport options How many choices appear and what they cost. Open
Minimum and maximum number of local travel choices shown each segment.
Transport List
Edit up to 50 options. Emoji and name become the button label racers see.
Emoji Name Cost Time
06 Save Season presets Store and reload setup combinations. Open
Give this preset a name, then save it.
Setup

Choose Your Team

Pick the team you want to control. Their skills will follow your setup rules.
